title: codehound.toml
description: Configuration file for CodeHound. All fields are optional; unknown fields are rejected.

languages.description: Restrict analysis to these languages. Allowed values: go, python (alias: py).

fail_on.description: Exit policy. Allowed: none, never, medium, warnings, high, strict. Unknown values are rejected. CLI --strict / --no-fail / --warnings-as-errors always win when set.

only.description: Only run the named rule IDs.

include.description: Glob patterns to include (relative to scan root).

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude (relative to scan root).

exclude_tests.description: Exclude test files (*_test.*) from analysis (default: true).

enabled.description: Load and apply baseline files by default.
Write and read the incremental analysis cache (default: true).

path.description: Custom directory for the incremental analysis cache. Overrides auto-discovery of .codehound-cache/.

max_size_mb.description: Maximum on-disk size of the cache in MiB. Oldest entries (by cached_at) are evicted when exceeded. Default: 500. Set to 0 to disable.

evict_target_ratio.description: Fraction of max_size_mb to retain after eviction. Values outside 0.1-0.99 fall back to 0.9.

max_file_size_mb.description: Skip reading and writing cache entries for files larger than this many MiB. Default: 4. Set to 0 to disable.

taint.description: Experimental taint-tracking configuration for supported Go CWE rules.

enabled.description: Use the taint-tracking engine for supported CWE rules.

bad_practices.description: Go bad-practice rule configuration for BP-* rules.

enabled.description: Run BP-* bad-practice rules by default.

severity.description: Optional severity override for BP-* findings.

severity_overrides.description: Per-rule severity overrides for BP-* rules. Keys are rule IDs (e.g. BP-1), values are severity levels.
